title: symphyotrichum moranense var. turneri
intro: Symphyotrichum moranense var. turneri, also known as Turner's aster or mountain aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum moranense var. turneri include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease congestion, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
